narrative:
Norwood 3-B (precinct in Hamilton County) has 836 registered voters, with 60.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.9 percentage points.
